title: Stage1 capability entity
description: Draft v1.4.0-gated first-class capability entity for Stage1 capability rollup output. Additive stub only; no current OODS handler consumes it.

id.description: Stable identifier for the rolled-up capability.

canonical_verb.description: Verb that anchors the capability across surfaces.

aliases.description: Alternate verbs or labels that resolve to the same capability.

oods_traits.description: Canonical OODS traits associated with the capability.

projection_variant_ids.description: Map-side projection_variants that present this capability.

preconditions.description: Optional preconditions aggregated across action exposures.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag reserved for future capability/API linkage.
